articles.title: Timberwolves will be as aggressive as possible this summer in trying to improve, Tim Connelly says
articles.original_title: Timberwolves will be as aggressive as possible this summer in trying to improve, Tim Connelly says
articles.summary: The message to the Minnesota Timberwolves from the championship tier of the NBA has been delivered clearly and forcefully with their elimination from the playoffs three straight times: You're not there yet. articles.title: Brunson’s Passionate Timeout Sparks Knicks’ Overtime Win
articles.original_title: What Jalen Brunson told Knicks teammates during impassioned timeout speech in Game 1 win
articles.summary: During a third‑quarter timeout in Game 1, New York Knicks point guard Jalen Brunson delivered an impassioned speech that energized his teammates. The rally helped the Knicks erase a deficit and secure an overtime victory.
key_points: Brunson’s speech focused on effort, belief, and staying together.
Knicks rallied from a double‑digit hole to win in overtime.
The moment was highlighted as a turning point in the game.

articles.title: BetMGM Bettor Wins $467K After Knicks Overcome 22‑Point Fourth‑Quarter Deficit
articles.original_title: Knicks' Historic Comeback Cashes Massive Spread Ladder Bet
articles.summary: A BetMGM player collected nearly $467,000 when the New York Knicks erased a 22‑point fourth‑quarter hole to beat the Cleveland Cavaliers in overtime. The comeback also covered a large spread bet placed on the Knicks.
key_points: Knicks trailed by 22 points late in the fourth quarter before rallying.
The overtime win settled a massive spread ladder wager.
The bettor’s payout approached half a million dollars.

articles.title: Mavericks President Masai Ujiri Takes Full Responsibility for Firing Jason Kidd
articles.original_title: Mavericks president Masai Ujiri says it was his decision to remove Jason Kidd as coach
articles.summary: Dallas Mavericks president Masai Ujiri confirmed that the decision to dismiss head coach Jason Kidd after five seasons was his alone. He described the move as difficult but necessary for a fresh start.
key_points: Ujiri said the organization needed a “clean slate.”
The firing came a day after the Mavericks announced Kidd’s departure.
Ujiri emphasized personal accountability for the decision.

articles.title: Three Candidates Emerging as Potential Mavericks Head Coaches
articles.original_title: Who will be Dallas Mavericks' next head coach? Three names to watch
articles.summary: Following Jason Kidd’s exit, the Dallas Mavericks are evaluating coaching options, with three names highlighted as front‑runners. President Masai Ujiri is reportedly looking for a fresh, innovative leader rather than a repeat hire.
key_points: Ujiri’s hiring philosophy favors a new, forward‑thinking coach.
Three specific candidates have been identified as top prospects.
The search aims to improve the Mavericks’ competitive trajectory.

key_points: Dylan Harper is favored to lead the game in assists.
